notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Max Muncy scores. Teoscar Hernández scores. Alex Call to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Santiago Espinal out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee inside-the-park HR
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee hits an inside-the-park home run (3) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Eric Haase scores.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds out sharply to first baseman Rafael Devers. Throwing error by first baseman Rafael Devers.
